claim_boundary: This case set contains real public GitHub tasks and real Agent-generated patches with published SWE-bench-Live functional outcomes. It establishes a reproducible personal-local evaluation input, not Delivery Clearance effectiveness, customer readiness, production safety, legal or security certification. Functional pass does not equal delivery clearance. A comparative claim requires local scorer replay, paired reviewer arms, blinded human adjudication, and review-cost measurement on these same candidates.
